"Meet Linda Liddle... She's from strategy and planning. She's the boss now."

7.0
2026MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

Tags

bullyingrole reversalsurvivalstruggle for survivalsurvival horrordeserted islandpower strugglecolleaguesbullying in the workplaceplane crashgender inequalitycomedy thrillercomedy horror
